key.name: enabled-monitors
key.description: List of monitor indices that should run a renderer. Empty means all monitors.

key.name: preset-rotation-interval
key.description: Seconds between automatic preset changes. Zero keeps manual rotation only.

key.name: blend-time
key.description: Seconds used to blend between presets.

key.name: beat-cuts-enabled
key.description: Allow beat events to force preset changes.

key.name: audio-sensitivity
key.description: Multiplier applied to audio-derived values.

key.name: show-on-empty-desktop-only
key.description: Pause the renderer unless the desktop is empty (no normal windows visible).

key.name: text-overlay-enabled
key.description: Show or hide the renderer status text overlay over visualizations.

key.name: pause-when-fullscreen
key.description: Pause the renderer when the focused window enters fullscreen mode.

key.name: hide-when-maximized
key.description: Hide or pause the renderer when windows are maximized.

key.name: show-only-when-media-playing
key.description: Run visualizations only when at least one MPRIS player has PlaybackStatus Playing. When no media is playing, the extension stays enabled but paused to save CPU and GPU.

key.name: preset-directory
key.description: Optional directory containing user-managed preset files.

key.name: fps-limit
key.description: Target frame rate limit used by the renderer.

key.name: audio-source
key.description: Output monitor source name or auto for automatic output-monitor selection (no microphone fallback).

key.name: audio-restart-max-attempts
key.description: Maximum audio pipeline restart attempts within a restart window before entering safe fallback mode.

key.name: audio-reprobe-delay-ms
key.description: Delay in milliseconds before retrying monitor-source selection when auto mode is in fallback.

key.name: eval-backend
key.description: Evaluator backend mode for per-frame expression execution.

key.name: debug-renderer
key.description: Enable verbose renderer logging while developing.

key.name: strict-render-path
key.description: Disable legacy Base64 frame fallback and require shared-memory frame transport.

key.name: preset-rotation-mode
key.description: Preset rotation strategy. Allowed values are random and sequential.

key.name: beat-cut-cooldown-sec
key.description: Minimum seconds between beat-triggered preset cuts.
